violations.text: Thermometer is lacking in the chicken walk-in cooler. All cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer inside the unit that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2026

The doors to the outside, located at the entrance, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026
The floor in areas of the kitchen is in poor repair. Grout has receded below tile level. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2026

The door to the outside, located at the entrance, is not tight-fitting. Space observed at the bottom of the door. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024
